feat: auto-finalize session at T-15 (BR-064)

At T-15, if the session is still in 'planning' status, the bot
automatically advances it to 'locked', refreshes the panel, then
posts the T-15 reminder. If already finalized, only the reminder
is posted. Finalize errors are logged but do not block the reminder.

- Updated scheduler.ts: sendT15Reminder fetches fresh session state,
  calls finalizeSession() + refreshPanelMessage() when status=planning
- Added BR-064 to docs/brd.md
- Updated BR-060 description to reflect combined behaviour

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Apply idiomatic Kotlin patterns across codebase

  in SettingsSheet, RadioUi, WearActivity, RadioPlaybackService

  WearPlaybackService, removing unnecessary companion objects

- Use ?.takeIf{}.let ?: run pattern in RadioTileService.onClick()

  constant location

commit.message:
fix: boolean false overrides dropped in multi-document helmfiles (#2527) (#2532)

* fix: environment values pollution causing boolean false overrides to be dropped (#2527)

PR #2367 introduced envCopy.Values = values in NewEnvironmentTemplateData,
where values = GetMergedValues() = Defaults + Values + CLIOverrides. This
caused .Environment.Values to include Defaults, so when multi-part helmfiles
re-assigned environment values via {{ toYaml .Environment.Values }}, Defaults
values (e.g. helmDefaults.atomic: true) were written into the environment
Values field. Later, GetMergedValues() applied Values over Defaults, causing
the stale atomic: true to win over the correct atomic: false override.

Fix: set .Environment.Values to Values + CLIOverrides only (excluding Defaults),
so re-assignment patterns don't pollute the Values layer with Defaults.

Signed-off-by: yxx <yxx@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: yxxhero <aiopsclub@163.com>

* fix: rename test to correctly reflect Values override Defaults precedence

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/sessions/1b251877-7050-404b-8cc7-abd6aa3ec36b

Co-authored-by: yxxhero <11087727+yxxhero@users.noreply.github.com>

* test: flip regression test fixture to exercise false override (issue #2527)

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/sessions/c428fd46-b698-4e88-bff2-4c9ac72d2deb

Co-authored-by: yxxhero <11087727+yxxhero@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
test: add 95 learning system integration tests

- Mastery algorithm: Unknown→Learning→Known lifecycle (14 tests)
- Spaced repetition: SM-2 intervals, EaseFactor, due filtering (13 tests)
- Multi-day journey: 5-day learner simulation with plan coherence (7 tests)
- Plan→progress lifecycle: full plan-practice-record cycle (9 tests)
- Progress caching: cache types, user isolation, invalidation (26 tests)
- Edge cases: IsKnown boundaries, EffectiveStreak, grace period (26 tests)

364/364 tests pass (95 new + 269 existing).

Add comprehensive CRM features: Deal Tracker, Closing Docs, Dealer App, Reports, Settings, AB Calc, Page Permissions

- Add Deal Trackers CRUD API with multi-tab form (Master, Bid Request, COCS, Commission, Estimate)
- Add Dealer Applications API with full borrower/employment/property form
- Add Closing Docs API with categorized checklist per active customer

commit.message:
fix: self-referencing childIds cycle corrupts gear export for nested items (SINs/licenses) (#91)

fix: correct updateListLinks childIds self-reference bug + add gearToTree tests

`updateListLinks` was pushing `savedItem.id` (the parent's own id) instead of
`updatedItem.id` (the child's id) when linking nested gear items. This caused
a self-referencing cycle in `childIds` whenever a license was added to a SIN
through the builder UI, making `gearToTree` infinitely recurse and crash the
export.

Fix: change `savedItem.childIds.push(savedItem.id)` →
     `savedItem.childIds.push(updatedItem.id)` in useGearApi.ts

Added 9 unit tests in exportUtils.test.ts covering:
- empty gear
- root-only SINs (no children)
- multiple root SINs
- SIN with one nested license
- SIN with multiple nested licenses
- mix of SINs with and without licenses
- parentId/childIds are omitted from every output node
- child items do not appear at root level
- items without childIds field (legacy data)

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/CptnFizzbin/shadow-sin/sessions/16c41b4a-df3c-46ba-8ea0-6619612e59d2

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: CptnFizzbin <115094891+CptnFizzbin@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: interactive transpiler demo simulator

Animated HTML demo showing n8n → RAPP → Copilot Studio pipeline:
- Left panel: n8n canvas with 26 nodes appearing + highlighting
- Right panel: terminal output → RAPP code → MCS YAML
- 7-step progress: load, analyze, transpile, validate, test, MCS, done
- Side-by-side test proving identical output
- Result overlay with stats (36 nodes → 1 file → 200 lines)

Zero dependencies. Press play and present.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
WP01-T06: Implement minimum operational API for the Control Plane Delivery Loop (#26)

* Initial plan

* feat: WP01-T06 implement minimum control plane delivery loop API

- Add `_row_to_run()` helper and `get_task_run(run_id, conn)` to persistence.py
- Add CreateTaskRequest, AssignRunRequest, CloseRunRequest Pydantic models to main.py
- Implement 8 internal endpoints in main.py (all protected with require_admin):
  POST /internal/control-plane/tasks
  GET  /internal/control-plane/tasks/{task_id}
  GET  /internal/control-plane/initiatives/{initiative_id}/tasks
  POST /internal/control-plane/tasks/{task_id}/runs
  GET  /internal/control-plane/runs/{run_id}
  POST /internal/control-plane/runs/{run_id}/assign
  POST /internal/control-plane/runs/{run_id}/start
  POST /internal/control-plane/runs/{run_id}/close
- Add backend/tests/test_control_plane_api.py (52 tests, all passing)
- All 204 tests in the full suite pass

Rewrite 'cost of slow waves' section for clarity

practical caveat (model adapts). Updated callout to emphasize the
real motivations for RoPE/ALiBi (relative position, length
generalization) rather than overstating wasted dimensions.

- Toolkit cards: per-tool accent colours → uniform silver-white tint
  (subtle glass effect on dark background)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: send wipe_assets to device on adoption and deletion (#84) (#165)

When a device is adopted or deleted from the CMS, send a wipe_assets
WebSocket command so it clears cached videos, images, and schedule
state. This prevents stale content from a previous adoption lingering
on re-adopted or deleted devices.

- Add WIPE_ASSETS / WIPE_ASSETS_ACK to the WS protocol
- adopt_device: send wipe_assets(reason=adopted) before sync
- delete_device: send wipe_assets(reason=deleted) before DB removal
- Handle wipe_assets_ack in WS message loop
- Update OpenAPI descriptions
- Add 5 tests (online adopt, orphan adopt, delete, offline adopt/delete)
- Bump version 1.14.0 → 1.15.0

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
